title: Breadcrumb
description: Hierarchical navigation aid. Prefer semantic <nav> + ordered list.

props.name: items
props.description: Breadcrumb items; last item is current page.

props.name: truncate
props.description: When true, collapse long paths (e.g. with an overflow menu).

keyboard: Native links are keyboard accessible by default.
If truncation uses an overflow menu, that menu must be keyboard operable.

must: Current page must be identifiable (aria-current and visual).
should: Use concise labels; avoid repeating the current page title elsewhere if redundant.
must_not: Do not use breadcrumb as the only navigation method.

token_usage.notes: Prefer semantic spacing tokens for gaps; map to primitives as needed.
